site.title: Gelato — Artisan Ice Cream & Coffee Delivery
site.description: Order premium artisan ice cream and coffee from local spots. Fast delivery, live courier tracking, and loyalty rewards in one app.

hero.title: Artisan ice cream, right to your door
hero.subtitle: Discover the best ice cream and sorbets from local spots in your city. Order in the app, track your courier live, and earn points toward rewards.

features.title: Why Gelato?
features.subtitle: No artificial shortcuts — just natural ingredients and an honest approach.

natural.title: Natural ingredients
natural.description: No dyes, no preservatives, no artificial flavor enhancers. Only the good stuff.

vegan.title: Something for everyone
vegan.description: Vegan, sugar-free, sorbets, and gluten-free options — there's a scoop for you.

fast.title: Fast delivery
fast.description: Fresh ice cream in an insulated loodbox, delivered in 30–60 minutes and perfectly chilled.

loyalty.title: Loyalty program
loyalty.description: Earn points on every order and redeem them for free ice cream and rewards.

tracking.title: Live tracking
tracking.description: Watch your courier on the map in real time, all the way to your door.

quality.title: Honest portions
quality.description: Weighed portions and free tastings. You pay for exactly what you get.

flavor.title: Something new every day
flavor.name: Belgian chocolate with salted caramel
flavor.description: Creamy Belgian chocolate cut through with a ribbon of salted caramel. Available today in select spots and for delivery.

how.title: How delivery works
how.subtitle: Four simple steps from the app to your door.

step1.title: Order in the app
step1.description: Pick your flavors and loodbox size, add your address, and pay in seconds.

step2.title: We pack the loodbox
step2.description: Your ice cream goes into an insulated 0.5 kg or 1.0 kg loodbox.

step3.title: Courier on the way
step3.description: By bike, e-scooter, or car — with a live route preview in the app.

step4.title: Delivered to your door
step4.description: Receive your order contactless, right at your doorstep.

app.title: The whole world of ice cream in one app
app.subtitle: Check flavor availability, order delivery, collect points, and redeem rewards.
app.point1: Check live flavor availability at every spot
app.point2: Order delivery and track your courier on the map
app.point3: Earn points on every single order
app.point4: Redeem points for free ice cream and rewards

cta.ready: Ready for the best ice cream in town?
cta.subtitle: Download the Gelato app and order your first loodbox today.

auth.name: Full name
auth.login_subtitle: Log in to order and collect points.
auth.signup_subtitle: Create an account and earn points on every order.
auth.phone_subtitle: We'll send you a code by SMS.
auth.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

account.loyalty_hint: Show this code at checkout to earn points.
account.history_empty: No transactions yet. Start earning points!
account.login_required: Log in to see your account.

quests.title: Quests
quests.subtitle: Complete quests and earn points.
quests.referral_desc: For every friend who signs up with your code and makes their first purchase, you get +500 points. Your friend gets +700 points.
quests.referral_share_message: Join Gelato and use my code {{code}} to get 700 points to start!
quests.birthday_desc: Add your birth date to receive +700 points. You can only do this once — after that the date can't be changed.
quests.birthday_note: Note: your birth date can't be changed later.

prizes.title: Rewards
prizes.subtitle: Exchange your points for tasty rewards.
prizes.my_prizes_empty: No active rewards yet. Pick something from the catalog below!
prizes.points_left: You'll have {{count}} pts left after activating
prizes.scan_hint: Show this code at the spot to claim your reward.
prizes.redeem_success: Reward activated! Show the QR code at the spot.

spots.title: Our spots
spots.subtitle: Pick a city and find the nearest Gelato spot on the map.
spots.none: No spots in this city yet — check back soon!
spots.error: Couldn't load spots. Please try again later.
spots.map_unavailable: Map unavailable — no Google Maps key set. Spots listed below.

spot.menu_empty: This spot hasn't added any products yet.

footer.tagline: Artisan ice cream and coffee delivery — straight from local spots.
footer.made: Made with ❤️ for ice cream lovers

checkout.stripe_unconfigured: Payments are temporarily unavailable (no Stripe key set).
checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.fulfillment: How would you like to get it?
checkout.pickup_hint: Show your loyalty QR code at the spot to collect and earn points.
checkout.out_of_range: Sorry, this address is outside the {{km}} km delivery range.
checkout.pay_online_hint: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay or BLIK. Points added right away.
checkout.pay_at_spot_hint: Pay with cash when you collect. Points added on collection.
checkout.login_required: You'll be asked to sign in to place your order.
checkout.success_message: Your order has been received. You can follow its status in your account.
checkout.success_pickup_cash: Your order is being prepared. Pay in cash and show your loyalty QR code at the spot to collect and earn points.

orders.complaint_sent: Report sent. We'll get back to you.
orders.complaint_error: Could not send. Please try again.
